notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.6. It addresses 16 CVEs: CVE-2025-21648, CVE-2026-23191, CVE-2026-43128, CVE-2026-43027, CVE-2026-45852, and 11 more.
notes.title: Description
